notes: Native macOS SwiftUI app. The agent grounds via the macOS accessibility tree (macax dump) and drives CGEvent taps. Bugs are observable in the window's a11y/screenshot.

bugs.title: Plus increments the count by 2 instead of 1
bugs.description: Clicking the 'Plus' button raises the displayed Count by 2 each click instead of 1.
bugs.expected_finding: Reports that the Plus button increments the count by 2 (wrong amount) instead of 1.

bugs.title: Reset sets the count to 1 instead of 0
bugs.description: Clicking 'Reset' sets the Count to 1 rather than clearing it to 0.
bugs.expected_finding: Reports that Reset does not clear the count to 0 (it shows 1).

bugs.title: Save reports success but clears the entered name
bugs.description: After typing a name and clicking 'Save', a green 'Saved' confirmation appears but the name field is wiped to empty instead of keeping the value.
bugs.expected: The name persists in the field and 'Saved' appears.
bugs.actual: 'Saved' appears but the name field is now empty.
bugs.expected_finding: Reports that saving clears/loses the entered name (the field empties) despite showing success.
